source_pr.title: executor: skip the unstable test.
source_pr.body: Multiple package runs on the same process in parallel, we can't make sure the test always pass.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: executor: skip the unstable test.
